cast.name: 穆哈迈德·阿比德·埃尔拉赫曼 Muhammad Abed Elrahman
穆敏·斯韦塔特 Mo'min Swaitat

introduction: While going through the photos on the camera of his recently deceased brother – a photojournalist in Gaza – Musa makes a painful discovery. As he struggles to secure his brother’s participation in an upcoming photo exhibition, he must also come to terms with his own feelings. Last Shot is an impressive and confrontational film about grief and censorship that hits a raw nerve.
